name: Nautilus (T-Embed CC1101)
label: Nautilus - sub-GHz RF firmware for LilyGo T-Embed CC1101
description: n0xa/Nautilus-Firmware (GPL-3.0) - lightweight sub-GHz (CC1101, 300-928 MHz) RX/TX firmware for the LilyGo T-Embed CC1101 (ESP32-S3). General-purpose dual-use RF tool for authorized use only: sub-GHz TX can reach licensed/region-restricted bands, so operate only where lawful. No jammer or deauth feature. Cyber Controller flashes the vendor merged image and adds no capability of its own.
note: n0xa/Nautilus-Firmware, GPL-3.0. Live-verified against release v1.0.0 (2025-12-26): the merged nautilus.bin (1,980,656 B, sha256 8be800fbf20bedabf9205559621a1d8878565d6f33a772bb0fa980b320988fcd) is the full image flashed at 0x0 - manifest.json arithmetic confirms it (firmware.bin 1,915,120 B @ 0x10000 -> 65536 + 1,915,120 = 1,980,656). include_regex ^nautilus\.bin$ selects the merged bin, NOT the 3-part bootloader.bin/partitions.bin/firmware.bin set. github_release tracks the vendor latest (no SHA pinning in this resolver). qio/80m/16MB per the T-Embed. Distinct firmware from Bruce (which also runs on this board); adds a dedicated sub-GHz project per the implement-all directive. Offset 0x0 kept until a real T-Embed CC1101 flash confirms it (Stage-5 hardware gate).
